businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir agacin yillik karbon tutma kapasitesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Captage annuel de carbone par arbre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Captura anual de carbono por árbol.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low SNR indicates poor signal quality.
suggestedActions: Use proper shielding for sensitive measurements.
Consider efficiency losses in energy calculations.

description.short: Calculate number of trees needed to offset carbon emissions.
description.long: Calculate number of trees needed to offset carbon emissions.

short_i18n.en: Calculate number of trees needed to offset carbon emissions.
short_i18n.tr: Salinan karbonu notralize etmek icin dikilmesi gereken agac Numbersini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die Anzahl der Bäume, die zur Kompensation der Kohlenstoffemissionen erforderlich sind.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le nombre d'arbres nécessaires pour compenser les émissions de carbone.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el número de árboles necesarios para compensar las emisiones de carbono.
short_i18n.ar: احسب عدد الأشجار اللازمة لتعويض انبعاثات الكربون.
